category_sources: Official etsh project page describes etsh as an enhanced, backward-compatible port of the V6 UNIX Thompson shell.
source_facts.description says etsh provides two ports of /bin/sh from V6 UNIX.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is etsh; official project site uses Etsh in the project title.
docs_sources: Official Etsh Docs page links manuals, notes, AnonCVS, and snapshots.
Official Etsh Usage page and manual page provide first-party usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Etsh Docs page says AnonCVS is available, making the official AnonCVS page the source-control entry point.
tags_sources: Official Etsh project and manual pages support Thompson shell, POSIX/UNIX, and command-line tags.
source_facts.description supports shell and V6 UNIX tags.
